query._note: The skill calls bare `retriever query "<question>"`; --format defaults to 'evidence' (fidelity-tagged {evidence, coverage}) and --hybrid defaults on. `query` also exposes power-user knobs (--rerank, --candidate-k, --content-types, --page-dedup, --format hits) that are available but NOT used by the skill's default invocation.

_default_table_name_note: engine DEFAULT_TABLE_NAME constant; NOT the skill name. Operator-config only.

legacy.note: verify still ships but the retriever skill does not depend on it; not gated by doctor.py.
